description: Welcome to Bonson! This former showhome offers premium upgrades and a central Pitt Meadows location steps to shopping, recreation and the West Coast Express. Bright and stylish with 10ft ceilings on the main, custom living room cabinetry, bistro-style dining room built-ins, and upgraded closet organizers throughout. The modern kitchen features sleek cabinetry, stainless appliances and a large island, opening to a spacious dining and living area. Enjoy a covered patio for year-round use. Three generous bedrooms up, plus a convenient bathroom on the main. A commuter’s dream with thoughtful design, natural light and contemporary finishes throughout.
